## Target

Marketplace or directory:

URL:

Priority: P0 / P1 / P2

## Submission Copy

Use:

- `SUBMISSION.md`
- `DISTRIBUTION.md`
- `MARKETPLACE_TARGETS.md`
- `assets/social/launch-card.svg`

## Checklist

- [ ] Confirm current submission flow.
- [ ] Submit repository URL.
- [ ] Include visual examples.
- [ ] Mention validation script.
- [ ] Mention no required network access.
- [ ] Mention non-affiliation disclaimer.
- [ ] Add listing URL to `MARKETPLACE_TARGETS.md`.
- [ ] Update `TRACTION.md`.
